testsuite.name: com.tests.LogoutTest

testcase.name: verifySuccessfulLogoutFunctionality
testcase.system-out: PASS: Logout functionality works successfully for user: priyankapriya

testcase.name: verifyLogoutLinkVisibilityAfterLogin
testcase.system-out: PASS: Logout link is visible after login for user: priyankapriya

testcase.name: verifyLogoutFunctionWithMultipleUsers
testcase.system-out: PASS: Login successful before logout for user: priyankapriya PASS: Logout successful for user: priyankapriya

testcase.name: verifyLogoutLinkBecomesInvisibleAfterLogout
testcase.system-out: PASS: Logout link becomes invisible after logout for user: priyankapriya

testcase.name: verifyLogoutLinkNotVisibleBeforeLogin
testcase.system-out: PASS: Logout link is not visible before login.

testcase.name: verifyLoginLinkVisibilityAfterLogout
testcase.system-out: PASS: Login link is visible after logout for user: priyankapriya

testcase.name: verifySessionIsClearedAfterLogout
testcase.system-out: PASS: User session is cleared after logout for user: priyankapriya

testcase.name: verifyWelcomeTextDisappearsAfterLogout
testcase.system-out: PASS: Welcome text disappears after logout for user: priyankapriya

testcase.name: verifyBackNavigationAfterLogout
testcase.system-out: PASS: Back navigation after logout does not restore session for user: priyankapriya

testsuite.system-out: PASS: Alert message text is displayed correctly: Please fill out Username and Password. PASS: Clicking the Login link opens the Login modal. DEFECT: Username field retained old value after reopening Login modal: priyankapriya DEFECT: Password field retained old value after reopening Login modal: priya@123 DEFECT: Forgot Password option is not available for credential recovery. DEFECT: Profile view option is not available for logged-in user. DEFECT: Change password option is not available for logged-in user. DEFECT: Order or purchase history option is not available for logged-in user. DEFECT: Saved payment or billing details are not available for logged-in user. PASS: Login link is displayed on the navigation bar. PASS: Close button is displayed in Login modal. PASS: Close icon is displayed in Login modal. PASS: Log in button is displayed in Login modal. PASS: Username input field is displayed in Login modal. PASS: Password input field is displayed in Login modal. PASS: Login modal header text is correct: Log in PASS: Login succeeded for valid credentials. Username: priyankapriya PASS: Welcome text is displayed correctly after login for user: priyankapriya INFO: Logged out successfully. DEFECT: Show/Hide password option is not available in the Password field. PASS: Username label is displayed correctly: Username: PASS: Password label is displayed correctly: Password: PASS: Correct validation alert displayed when Password is blank: Please fill out Username and Password. PASS: Correct validation alert displayed when Username is blank: Please fill out Username and Password. PASS: Close button is visible in signup modal. PASS: Close icon is visible in signup modal. PASS: Sign up button is visible in signup modal. PASS: Clicking Sign up opens signup modal. DEFECT: Username field retained old value after reopening signup modal: priyankapriya DEFECT: Password field retained old value after reopening signup modal: priya@123 PASS: Password field label is correct: Password: DEFECT: Password field does not provide show/hide toggle option. PASS: Sign up link is visible in navbar. PASS: Signup form contains email field. DEFECT: Signup modal does not include a Confirm Password field. PASS: Signup modal title is correct: Sign up PASS: Existing user signup was correctly rejected for user: priyankapriya. Alert: This user already exist. PASS: Correct validation alert displayed when password is empty: Please fill out Username and Password. PASS: Correct validation alert displayed when username is empty: Please fill out Username and Password. PASS: Username field is present in signup modal. PASS: Password field is present in signup modal. PASS: Username field label is correct: Username: DEFECT: Weak credentials were accepted or not properly rejected. Username: a, Password: 1, Alert: This user already exist. DEFECT: Weak credentials were accepted or not properly rejected. Username: ab, Password: 12, Alert: This user already exist. DEFECT: Weak credentials were accepted or not properly rejected. Username: test, Password: 123, Alert: This user already exist. PASS: About modal opens successfully. PASS: All product category links are visible. PASS: Brand logo text is displayed correctly: PRODUCT STORE PASS: Carousel contains exactly 3 slides. PASS: Carousel Next button changes the active slide. PASS: Carousel Previous button changes the active slide back. PASS: Homepage carousel is visible on page load. PASS: Clicking Cart navigates user to the cart page. PASS: Clicking Home keeps user on home page and products are displayed. PASS: Contact modal opens successfully. PASS: Each category filter returns at least one product. PASS: Laptops category displays products. Product count: 6 PASS: Logout link is not visible before login. PASS: All main navigation bar links are visible on page load. PASS: Monitors category displays products. Product count: 2 PASS: Page title contains STORE. Actual title: STORE PASS: Phones category displays products. Product count: 9 PASS: Product cards are loaded and visible on the home page initially. PASS: Phones, Laptops and Monitors category links are visible. PASS: Clicking Next changes the product list. PASS: Each category returns at least one product. PASS: Laptops category displays products. Count: 6 PASS: Laptops category shows relevant laptop products. PASS: Monitors category displays products. Count: 2 PASS: Monitors category shows relevant monitor products. PASS: Next pagination button is visible. PASS: Phones category displays products. Count: 7 PASS: Phones category shows relevant phone products. PASS: Clicking Previous changes the product list after navigating Next. PASS: Product cards are visible on initial load. PASS: Product category section is visible. PASS: Switching between categories updates the product list. PASS: Add to cart button is displayed on product details page. PASS: Add to cart success alert displayed: Product added PASS: Clicked product matches details page product name: Samsung galaxy s6 PASS: Laptops category product details page opened successfully. PASS: Monitors category product details page opened successfully. PASS: Phones category product details page opened successfully. PASS: Product description is displayed on product details page. PASS: Product details page URL is correct: https://demoblaze.com/prod.html?idp_=1 PASS: Product image is displayed on product details page. PASS: Product name is displayed on product details page. PASS: Product price is displayed on product details page. Price: $360 *includes tax PASS: Product details page opened successfully for product: Samsung galaxy s6 PASS: Cart contains the added product with correct title: Samsung galaxy s6 PASS: Cart table is displayed on cart page. INFO: First product: Samsung galaxy s6 | Price: 360 INFO: Second product: Nokia lumia 1520 | Price: 820 INFO: Expected total: 1180 INFO: Actual total: 1180 PASS: Cart total is correct after adding multiple products. PASS: Cart total is displayed after product is added. Total: 360 INFO: Product: Samsung galaxy s6 INFO: Same product row count in cart: 2 DEFECT: Duplicate product created multiple rows instead of updating quantity. Row count found: 2 PASS: Place Order button is displayed on cart page. PASS: Place Order modal opens successfully. PASS: Product added to cart successfully: Samsung galaxy s6 PASS: User deleted product from cart successfully. PASS: User navigated to cart page successfully. DEFECT: User can still open purchase flow without products in cart. PASS: Precondition passed: product added to cart and cart page opened. PASS: All Place Order input fields are displayed.
